case_title: JACK WILCOX VS. FEDERICO MANDUJANO et al*****CASE TRANSFERRED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY*****

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-12-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS FEDERICO MANDUJANO AND JMB CONSTRUCTION, INCORPORATED'S MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE TO SAN MATEO SUPERIOR COURT [CCP SECTION 396 B] IS GRANTED PER STATEMENT OF NON-OPPOSITION FILED BY PLAINTIFF. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
